command: MT5='/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5' && echo '=== terminal.ini ===' && cat "$MT5/config/terminal.ini" 2>/dev/null && echo '=== common.ini ===' && cat "$MT5/config/common.ini" 2>/dev/null && echo '=== Config/terminal.ini ===' && cat "$MT5/Config/terminal.ini" 2>/dev/null && echo '=== Config/common.ini ===' && cat "$MT5/Config/common.ini" 2>/dev/null && echo '=== MQL5/Profiles dirs ===' && find "$MT5/MQL5/Profiles" -type d 2>/dev/null && echo '=== MQL5/Profiles files ===' && find "$MT5/MQL5/Profiles" -type f 2>/dev/null | head -30 && echo '=== Experts dir ===' && ls -la "$MT5/MQL5/Experts/" 2>/dev/null && ls -la "$MT5/MQL5/Experts/PropFirmBot/" 2>/dev/null && echo '=== .ex5 files ===' && find "$MT5" -name '*.ex5' 2>/dev/null
